AI Scheduling Assistant

Smart AI Scheduling That Automates Bookings for Your Business

Sophiie checks availability, suggests smart scheduling, avoids overlaps, and keeps your calendar and customers perfectly in sync.

Learn More

Stay on Top of Your Schedule

Managing jobs and appointments has never been this easy. Sophiie's Smart Scheduling is a built-in calendar within your dashboard that keeps everything organised and accessible.

What Can Sophiie's Smart Scheduling Do?

Set Jobs or Appointments

Easily add new jobs or appointments to your calendar directly from the dashboard.

Drag-and-Drop Rescheduling

Need to move a booking? Simply drag and drop it to a new time or day—no fuss, no confusion.

Customisable Views

Keep your calendar organised with clearly displayed job schedules.

Real-Time Updates

Changes to your calendar are updated instantly, ensuring your team stays informed.

Ready to Meet Sophiie?

Meet your AI Office Manager—designed to keep your business running smoothly while you stay focused on the big picture. From managing enquiries and bookings to keeping your team and customers in sync, Sophiie does it all.

Learn More

Why Choose Sophiie's Job Manager?

Boost Productivity

Organise your team's time effectively, ensuring no overlaps or missed appointments.

Stay Flexible

Make quick adjustments to bookings with drag-and-drop ease.

Stay in Control

Custom views and real-time updates keep you on top of your schedule at all times.

Save Time

Eliminate manual rescheduling headaches and keep your calendar organised in one place.

Explore More Smart Solutions

Discover additional tools that work seamlessly with Sophiie to elevate your customer communication experience.

Never miss a call again—Sophiie answers, qualifies leads, and routes inquiries seamlessly.

Frequently asked questions

Find quick answers to common questions about Sophiie's smart scheduling.

Sophiie's built-in calendar lets you add, view, and manage jobs and appointments directly from your dashboard with drag-and-drop simplicity.
You can switch between daily, weekly, and monthly views to get the level of detail you need.
Yes. Simply drag and drop any job or appointment to a new time slot or day. Changes update in real-time for your whole team.
Yes. Jobs are colour-coded by status so you can see at a glance what's pending, in progress, or completed.
Yes. Two-way sync with Google Calendar and Outlook keeps everything aligned across platforms.

Ready to Simplify Your Scheduling?

Transform the way you manage your time with Sophiie's Smart Scheduling. Try it today and see how easy organising your day can be!
